title: Pack stack-view zone blocks
description: Prevent zone overlays from overlapping in Stack view by rendering zones as block annotations that move right or below when they would collide, and reuse that projection for Stack+3D zone volumes.
completion_notes: Added stackZoneBoxes() for Stack-specific zone projection. renderBaseViewWithOverlays now replaces zone overlay boxes with packed Stack blocks when baseView is layer/Stack. SVG output expands its viewBox/width/height to include shifted blocks. The optional 3D view uses the same packed Stack blocks for zone volumes when baseView is layer and the zone overlay is enabled.
verification: Browser check on http://127.0.0.1:4174/: Stack+2D+zone rendered five zone blocks with overlaps=[], expanded viewBox 0 0 1888 1047, and Stack+3D+zone rendered one canvas, one ViewCube, three axes, and no console errors.
handoff: Continue TASK-009 visual polish. Stack zone blocks are intentionally additive annotations, not enclosing containers; overview zone overlay remains the enclosing container view.
